ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the player is part of */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is currently playing for */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's agent */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Player's Twitter handle */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Player's Instagram handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., Baseball, Basketball, Football) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team is part of */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the contract belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the contract is with */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year of the contract */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., Active, Expired, Terminated) */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the contract ends */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Any signing bonus or performance bonuses */,
  "injury_protection" INTEGER /* Whether the contract includes injury protection */,
  "no_trade_clause" INTEGER /* Whether the contract includes a no-trade clause */,
  "option_years" INTEGER /* Number of option years in the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_year" INTEGER /* Year the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., Salary, Bonus) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending, Missed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_payments_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., Batting Average, Earned Run Average) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "season" TEXT /* The season the statistic is from */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific game the statistic is from */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
